description: A practical course on diagnosing and resolving real-world Kubernetes failures. Covers the most common Pod failure states, a repeatable diagnostic workflow using kubectl, and live debugging techniques with ephemeral containers.
summary: Learn to independently diagnose Pod failures that occur in production Kubernetes environments.
target_audience: Intermediate Kubernetes users who are familiar with core concepts (Pod, Deployment, kubectl) and want to diagnose Pod failures in production on their own.

lectures.title: Pod Troubleshooting: From CrashLoopBackOff to Ephemeral Containers
